title: Cruise Stocks Climb Amid Strong Booking Demand, Analyst Upgrades

title: Stock-Split Watch: 3 Fantastic Growth Stocks That Could Split Their Shares in 2023

title: Booking Holdings (BKNG) Ups Generative AI Game With Google

title: Is Booking Holdings (BKNG) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
text: Investors often turn to recommendations made by Wall Street analysts before making a Buy, Sell, or Hold decision about a stock. While media reports about rating changes by these brokerage-firm employed (or sell-side) analysts often affect a stock's price, do they really matter?

title: Better Travel Buy: Booking Holdings Vs. Expedia
text: On initial examination, Expedia appears to be trading at a discount to Booking Holdings given its lower trailing EV/EBITDA and P/FCF ratios. On closer look, Booking Holdings appears to be the more shareholder friendly business with more conservative financing, though is trading at a slight premium to our estimates of fair value. Booking Holdings also appears to be a better business qualitatively, buoyed by its wider moat from its larger network. Expedia's home rental site Vrbo also does not match Booking's scale.

title: 3 Cheap Tech Stocks to Buy Right Now
text: Each of these tech stocks presents a unique investment opportunity, demonstrating that "cheap" can mean many different things in the stock market. For example, Booking Holdings is a cash machine with its stock trading at just 16 times free cash flow.
